Name: Alexander - The Soul of the Creator (A12S)

Note:
Enter commands in echo channel for dynamic drawing.
Usage:
[target] [shape] [parameters...]

Target (optional, defaults to self):
- test ... (draw on self)
- test eid=[entity ID] ... (draw on specified entity)

Shapes and parameters:
- circle [radius]
- fan [radius] [angle]
- rect [width] [length]
- donut [outer radius] [inner radius]
- straight [width] [length]

Examples:
- test circle 5
- test eid=4000123A fan 10 90

Author: Linoa235
Name: The Forbidden Land, Eureka - The Baldesion Arsenal

Note:
Police functions for Tower of Power instance, providing key mechanic marker announcements and checks. Also supports active checks for money throwing, resurrection, food, blue potions, etc.

------------ Echo channel query commands ------------
Check Blue Potions: Type [/e blue potion check] to see alchemist blue potion usage, [/e blue potion clear] to clear data
Check Resurrection: Type [/e resurrection check <numbers>...], e.g., [/e resurrection check 1 2] to show players with 1 and 2 resurrection remaining. Without numbers, shows all players with 0-3 resurrections
Check Food: Type [/e food check] to show players without food or with remaining time below threshold
Check Money Throw: Type [/e money throw check] to show players who used money throw and their counts, [/e money throw clear] to clear statistics
Author: Linoa235
Name: Tower of Power (Police)

Note:
Type [/e Crescent Mine Clear] in chat to start mine clearing. Type again to hide. Display lasts 1800s. If display disappears, re-enter the command.
Major updates:
- Added auto show/hide mine markers on map change.
- Data restructured by Map ID, ensuring only current map mines are displayed.
Author: Linoa235
Name: Tower of Power Mine Clearing (Inside Tower)
